subject: We need to hold the Trump administration accountable. Add your name if you agree.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

| | Derek, the 2018 midterms could be _the most important elections of this generation._

When voters head to the polls on [November 6th,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1168/3e0906/6d283d6f/3e36e736/3260375215/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Vote-for-Accountability?source=20180901_2_PET_TEAM_Accountability&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180901_2_PET_TEAM_Accountability") they won't only be choosing their representatives: **They 'll be deciding whether or not our nation holds the Trump administration accountable.**

[Commit to voting for Democrats who will hold members of the Trump administration accountable for their actions: Add your name here.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1168/3e0906/6d283d6f/3e36e735/3260375215/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Vote-for-Accountability?source=20180901_2_PET_TEAM_Accountability&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Commit+to+voting+for+Democrats+who+will+&utm_campaign=20180901_2_PET_TEAM_Accountability")

We've all seen the news stories. People around the president are facing charges for crimes committed before, during, and after the 2016 election, some of which may even involve the president himself.

We need to hold congressional investigations and hearings to get to the bottom of things. And the only way that's going to happen is by electing Democrats to take back a majority in the House and in the Senate.

[Commit to vote today.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1168/3e0906/6d283d6f/3e36e734/3260375215/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/Vote-for-Accountability?source=20180901_2_PET_TEAM_Accountability&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Commit+to+vote+today&utm_campaign=20180901_2_PET_TEAM_Accountability")

Thanks,

name: Zack Malitz, betofortexas.com
subject: Inviting you to do something BIG in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The race to elect Beto is stacking up to be truly historic -- and the
election results will impact millions of lives across the country. That’s
why we’re inviting you to be a BIG part of the most critical phase of the
race. Give me a moment to explain...

What happens in Texas this November will have a tremendous impact on the
rest of the country.

The Senate majority hangs in the balance. Texas is now a battleground
state. But in order to win, we need all hands on deck to contact voters
between October 8 and Election Day on November 6.

That’s why we’re inviting you to join our program, “Come Back to Texas,”
during the final sprint of our campaign. Thousands of volunteers are
joining together in the largest ‘get out the vote’ campaign in Texas
history.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=ema20180902&t=1001&akid=6676%2E444211%2EwwKcWC ]If that’s something you might want to be part of, please fill out the
form here.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/come-back-to-texas?source=ema20180902&t=1002&akid=6676%2E444211%2EwwKcWC ]TRAVEL TO TEXAS

We know this is a lot to ask, and we wouldn’t bother if it wasn't so
important. An organizer on the campaign will contact you, provide you with
training, assist with the logistics of your trip, and then connect you
with campaign staff when you arrive in Texas. If finances might be a
barrier for you to come to Texas, still fill out the application -- we
want to work with you directly to figure out what kind of support we can
provide to get you here to volunteer.

If you can’t make it, we understand! Another way you can help is by
hosting a phone bank for Beto near you -- fill out the form here.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/signup/host-event?source=ema20180902&t=1003&akid=6676%2E444211%2EwwKcWC ]HOST A PHONE BANK

We are on the verge of making history, and the entire country will be
watching what happens in Texas this November. Now, if we dig even deeper
in these final weeks, we can pull it off.

Thank you for everything so far,

Zack Malitz
Field Director
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1031?refcode=ema20180902&t=1004&akid=6676%2E444211%2EwwKcWC ]DONATE
$3

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180902footer&t=1005&akid=6676%2E444211%2EwwKcWC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=6676%2E444211%2EwwKcWC

P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Inside baseball (long but important read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Hey Derek,

Wanted to let you in on some campaign "inside baseball": **September is the most important month of a campaign.**

Now, of course, Election Day is the most important _day_ of the campaign (and, frankly, of the year). And the first week of November, when we get out the vote, is the most important _week_ of the campaign.

**But as someone who 's run their fair share of races, I can tell you from experience that September is every campaign's make-or-break month. **

[Will you help us start out the month strong by chipping in, Derek?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1169/3e0906/6d37f6d6/3e36e764/3887016550/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180902_1_FR_TK_September-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+help+us+start+out+the+month+str&utm_campaign=20180902_1_FR_TK_September-LDND&source=20180902_1_FR_TK_September-LDND") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1169/3e0906/6d37f6d6/3e36e77b/3887016550/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180902_1_FR_TK_September-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180902_1_FR_TK_September-LDND&source=20180902_1_FR_TK_September-LDND")

_Tim_

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I have a story for you Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter, you may have noticed I wear a small pin of a yellow canary perched in a cage. Years ago, at a Workers' Memorial Day rally in Lorain, Ohio, a steelworker from Local 114 gave me that pin. Miners would bring canaries into the mines with them to check for the presence of dangerous levels of gas. If the canary died, the miners knew to get out. Back then, there were no formal protections for workers. They only had each other. So they banded together to fight for the right to collectively bargain, and for safer work conditions and against child labor. I've worn the canary pin ever since I got it that day. It reminds me not just of the workers' rights movement, but of every hardworking man and woman in America and the families they support. It reminds me how important it is for me to keep fighting like hell to give each of those families a voice in the U.S. Senate. **Tomorrow is Labor Day -- the day we remember the workers who made America the prosperous country we are today.** We must remember that protecting workers' rights isn't a battle that's behind us -- not by a longshot. Across the country, Republicans have moved to weaken collective bargaining rights. Just this year, the Supreme Court dealt a blow to unions with their decision in _Janus v. AFSCME_. **Together, we have to keep fighting like hell for workers. I am committed to protecting the men and women who make things in America.** I hope I can count on your continuing support as we move closer to Election Day. subject: We cannot wait to find out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
But here's the thing:
#

Peter -
Soon we'll find out exactly how much money all of our opponents have heading into the final 11 days of this campaign.
We're likely to find out that their corporate donors have dumped even more money into their campaigns to try to stop us. They see that we have the momentum, and they'll do everything they can to make sure Zephyr doesn't get anywhere near this office.
But here's the thing: We cannot wait to find out. We need to prepare to fight back now, and since we aren't taking corporate money, we have to ask:
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now to make sure we're ready for whatever our opponents throw our way? Time is running out, but if we're in this together, we can win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780918/6e822e2f/1a8c2cae/4173ace4/718427070/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA5MDItZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-september?refcode=em180902-full")**
After the last deadline, we found out that one of our opponents had received $150,000 from just one corporation. We don't have to outraise them, but we can't let them drown out our voices.
Thank you again for everything you've done so far to support our campaign. Now, let's bring it home!
All my best,
Dan Torres
Campaign Manager
Zephyr for NY

I'm going to give it to you straight, team: we didn't raise as much money in August as we expected, and there will be devastating consequences if we don't make up the difference this month.

My team keeps sending me news clips about how Congressman Barletta is expecting a flood of outside spending any day now, how President Trump reportedly raised $1 million when he campaigned here last month and how Democrats will win or lose the Senate majority based on the strength of our campaigns in states like Pennsylvania.

Republicans won this state in 2016, so we can't afford to be complacent. Democrats' path to the majority runs directly through Pennsylvania, and if we lose here and fail to take back the Senate, we won't be able to effectively push back against the most dangerous and divisive pieces of President Trump's agenda.

**There is too much on the line -- we simply cannot fall short. Please donate whatever you can before midnight.**

Hello,

We knew that with the millions pouring into our opponent's campaign from special-interest groups, we'd need to ask a lot from supporters like you.

But thanks to Nevadans across the state, we were able to exceed our end-of-month fundraising goal and launch our latest TV ad about my plan to create new, good-paying jobs for Nevadans.

I can't thank you enough, and wanted to make sure you were one of the first to see our new ad.

**[I'm really proud of this ad, telling my father's story and sharing my plans for Nevada. Will you check it out and then chip in whatever you can afford to help us keep it up on the air? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/4US46fN2l53dDgYh9tDtvbwKKYdrcBkdiFmPuo4XVTo=/m8yfeu-DjNmRdBOn8bF4Fvs7nfjGlTI5lGbH8KuZAHw=?gpsid=37_57_3318&refcode=em18_180902_ADdig_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180902_ADdig_L1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4US46fN2l53dDgYh9tDtvbwKKYdrcBkdiFmPuo4XVTo=/m8yfeu-DjNmRdBOn8bF4Fvs7nfjGlTI5lGbH8KuZAHw=?gpsid=37_57_3318&refcode=em18_180902_ADdig_SS_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180902_ADdig_SS_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
[WATCH THE AD](https://act.myngp.com/el/4US46fN2l53dDgYh9tDtvbwKKYdrcBkdiFmPuo4XVTo=/m8yfeu-DjNmRdBOn8bF4Fvs7nfjGlTI5lGbH8KuZAHw=?gpsid=37_57_3318&refcode=em18_180902_ADdig_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180902_ADdig_B1_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)
Good jobs matter.

I was twelve when my dad got laid off. On that day, he lost more than a paycheck. He lost the dignity that comes with a job.

That's why job creation has always been a priority for me. And it'd be a priority from day one as governor.

I'll keep fighting for more good-paying jobs by expanding technical and skills training so our workers can get jobs in growing industries like clean energy, construction, and advanced mechanics.

**[Take a moment to watch our new ad, then chip in to help us spread our message, win in November, and create more good jobs across Nevada.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4US46fN2l53dDgYh9tDtvbwKKYdrcBkdiFmPuo4XVTo=/m8yfeu-DjNmRdBOn8bF4Fvs7nfjGlTI5lGbH8KuZAHw=?gpsid=37_57_3318&refcode=em18_180902_ADdig_L2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180902_ADdig_L2_fnd_gq_act__SS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso&noskip=true)**

Thank you,

Steve

Wanted to let you in on some campaign "inside baseball": **September is the most important month of a campaign.**

Now, of course, Election Day is the most important _day_ of the campaign (and, frankly, of the year). And the first week of November, when we get out the vote, is the most important _week_ of the campaign.

**But as someone who 's run their fair share of races, I can tell you from experience that September is every campaign's make-or-break month. **

September marks our [last public filing deadline of the quarter.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f116b/3e0906/6d07dc70/3e36e792/3931857210/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+last+public+filing+deadline+of+the+quart&utm_campaign=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND&source=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND") When we close the books on this month, and the most important quarterly deadline of the election, our numbers will be public for the world to see.

Plus, the funds raised in September enable us to plan out the extent of our "Get Out the Vote" effort to get voters engaged in the last month of the campaign. And since I am at the top of the ticket, mobilizing voters for my race and 11 Congressional races in Virginia, the September push will be critical to Democratic success on [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f116b/3e0906/6d07dc70/3e36e791/3931857210/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND&source=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND")

So when this month ends, we'll be in a sprint to the finish line. Help make sure our campaign operation is fully in place and ready to turn out every Democrat in Virginia on Election Day: [Chip in if you can, any amount helps.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f116b/3e0906/6d07dc70/3e36e790/3931857210/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+Chip+in+if+you+can+any+amount+helps&utm_campaign=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND&source=20180902_2_FR_TEAM_September-fwd-LDND")

Thanks for sticking with me,

_Tim_
